title: CapCard v3 Schema Design

schema.object: T224: CapCard v3 schema design based on tropical semiring and SDT

eml_depth_field.name: eml_depth
eml_depth_field.description: EML depth of the capability (0=discrete, 1=exp, 2=log, 3=oscillatory, inf=undecidable)

shadow_type_field.name: shadow_type
shadow_type_field.description: Shadow Depth Theorem classification of the capability

schema.v2_compatibility: All v2 fields preserved. v3 fields are additive.

example_capability.name: reasoning_l_functions
example_capability.description: Can reason about L-functions and zeta zeros

analysis.verdict: CapCard v3: 4 new EML-native primitives. Backward compatible with v2.
analysis.theorem: T224: CapCard v3 Schema — EML depth, shadow type, tropical complexity, Langlands tier

key_theorem: T224: CapCard v3 Schema (S503). 4 new primitives: eml_depth (0/1/2/3/inf), shadow_type (algebraic/oscillatory), tropical_complexity (MAX-PLUS-k), langlands_tier (1-4). Backward compatible with v2. Enables formal EML classification of AI capabilities.
rabbit_hole_log: eml_depth: integer 0-3 or 'inf' — core classification field
shadow_type: algebraic or oscillatory — SDT classification
langlands_tier: 1-4 or null for non-number-theoretic capabilities
T224: CapCard v3 ready for implementation
